domain: Permafrost 3-tier cryogenic carbon preservation: active layer, cryoturbation zone, deep permafrost; mineral-associated OF stable for millennia.
specific_mechanism: Three-tier soil column with progressively colder, less-mixed strata; iron-mineral binding stabilizes carbon in the deepest tier for millennial timescales.
llm_application: PERMAFROST-PARAM: 3-tier parameter memory. Tier 1: full-precision weights (recently used). Tier 2: INT8-quantized warm cache (demoted after K=100 unused steps). Tier 3: FP4-quantized + disk-offloaded deep storage (demoted after K=10000 unused steps). Each tier-3 weight carries a small high-precision 'stabilizer anchor' (iron-mineral analog) preventing precision degradation. Promotion via explicit thaw event on access.
novelty_claim: GPTQ/AWQ uniform quantization; mixed-precision per-layer; DeepSpeed Zero CPU offload. None implement access-frequency-gated 3-tier with stabilizer-anchor — but 3-tier memory hierarchy concept is mainstream in storage systems and increasingly applied to LLMs.
